Term

Fall and Spring semester

Winter, Summer IA, IB, IIC, IID (3-week sessions)

Business Days for Schedule Adjustment Period

10 days

1 day

The Hold File is a roster of students who wish to register for a course but who do not meet the course restrictions. These students must be placed on the hold file even though the course may have seats available. Students on the waitlist receive priority over those on the hold file.
